headline: How Is Marsh & McLennan’s Stock Performance Compared to Other Insurance Stocks?
summary: Marsh & McLennan has trailed its peers over the past year, but analysts maintain a reasonably bullish on the stock and its growth prospects.

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Aon, Lowers Price Target to $360
summary: UBS  analyst Brian Meredith   maintains Aon (NYSE:AON) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $385 to $360.
